ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "execute_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the execute stage of the task */,
  "finalize_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the finalize stage of the task */,
  "initial_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the initial stage of the task */,
  "initialize_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the initialize stage of the task */,
  "subdomain_count" INTEGER /* Number of subdomains involved in the task */,
  "threadjoin_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for thread joining */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* Time step at which the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the task */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the thread */,
  "resource_usage" REAL /* Amount of computational resources (e.g., CPU, memory) used during the task */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Calculated field to represent the efficiency of the task execution */,
  "bottleneck" TEXT /* Description of any identified bottlenecks */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_timestep FOREIGN KEY ("timestep") REFERENCES time_steps ("timestep"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_subdomain_count FOREIGN KEY ("subdomain_count") REFERENCES subdomains ("subdomain_count")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_steps" (
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time step */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* Time step number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time step */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the task */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the time step */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the time step */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the time step */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the time step (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_steps_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subdomains" (
  "subdomain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subdomain */,
  "subdomain_count" INTEGER /* Number of subdomains involved in the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subdomain */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the task */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the thread */,
  "resource_usage" REAL /* Amount of computational resources used by the subdomain */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Calculated field to represent the efficiency of the subdomain */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subdomain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subdomains_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subdomains_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the task started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the task ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the task */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the thread */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the thread */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the thread started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the thread ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the thread (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the task */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions for the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)
